import React from "react"; import classes from './Dialogs.module.css' import DialogItem from "./DialogItem/DialogItem"; import Message from "./Message/Message"; import {Field, reduxForm, reset} from "redux-form"; import {Area} from "../Common/FormsControls/FormsControls"; import {required} from "../../utils/validators/validators"; const Dialogs = (props) => { let dialogsElements = props.dialogsPage.dialogs.map(d => ); let messagesElements = props.dialogsPage.messages.map(m => ); let addNewMessage = (value) => { props.addMessage(value.newMessageBody); }; return (
{dialogsElements}
{messagesElements}
); } const Textarea = Area('textarea') const afterSubmit = (result, dispatch) => dispatch(reset('dialogAddMessageForm')); const AddMessageForm = (props) => { return

}; const AddMessageFormRedux = reduxForm({form: 'dialogAddMessageForm', onSubmitSuccess: afterSubmit})(AddMessageForm); export default Dialogs;
